message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-sn6tm (dag_longest_path tie-break parity)

Fixed in commit 8053c11. dag_longest_path now native — operates on
fnx.G.pred directly, sidestepping the _fnx_to_nx conversion that
scrambled pred iteration order. Tie-break exactly matches nx for
the documented [1,2,4,5] / [1,3,4,5] case.

Sweep: 6613 passed, 0 failed (+6 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
